Package Index | Class Index
public static interface

BinderInternal.CallStatsObserver

com.android.internal.os.BinderInternal.CallStatsObserver

Class Overview

Allows to track observe incoming binder call stats.

Summary

Public Methods
abstract void noteBinderThreadNativeIds(int[] binderThreadNativeTids)
Notes the native IDs of threads taking incoming binder calls.
abstract void noteCallStats(int workSourceUid, long incrementalCallCount, Collection<BinderCallsStats.CallStat> callStats)
Notes incoming binder call stats associated with this work source UID.

Public Methods

public abstract void noteBinderThreadNativeIds (int[] binderThreadNativeTids)

Notes the native IDs of threads taking incoming binder calls.

Parameters
binderThreadNativeTids int

public abstract void noteCallStats (int workSourceUid, long incrementalCallCount, Collection<BinderCallsStats.CallStat> callStats)

Notes incoming binder call stats associated with this work source UID.

Parameters
workSourceUid int
incrementalCallCount long
callStats Collection
